content.title: Raptor Greetings  -  Peer Communication Practice
content.objective: Maya will initiate or respond to peer greetings with 80% accuracy across 10 trials, using verbal or gesture-based greetings in structured and unstructured settings.
content.warm_up: Show Maya a short clip of Blue the raptor greeting Owen in Jurassic World. Ask: 'How does Blue say hello to Owen?' Discuss how even raptors have their own way of greeting friends. Use this as a bridge: 'Today we're going to practice our own greetings  -  just like Blue does with her pack.'
content.main_activity:
1. Raptor Pack Greeting Circle (10 min): Students sit in a circle. Each student has a dinosaur card. When Maya's turn comes, she greets the student next to her using one of three practiced phrases: 'Hi [name],' 'Good morning,' or a wave + smile. The greeted student responds, then Maya passes her raptor card.

2. Raptor Relay (10 min): Set up stations around the room. At each station, a peer waits. Maya must greet the peer before receiving her next clue to find Blue's 'nest' (a purple container with dinosaur stickers). Practice greeting in hallway, cafeteria entrance, and classroom door contexts.

3. Free Play Practice (5 min): During the last 5 minutes, Maya chooses a peer to play with at the water table. Prompt a greeting before play begins. Fade prompts as Maya initiates independently.
materials_needed: Dinosaur greeting cards (laminated, with raptor images)
Visual prompt card with greeting options
content.scaffolding_notes: Maya responds best to familiar peers  -  pair her with established peer buddies first. Use visual prompt card showing three greeting options (words + picture). If Maya becomes overwhelmed in larger group, reduce circle to 3-4 students. Have weighted lap pad available during circle time. Provide dinosaur sticker after every 2 successful greetings. Avoid fluorescent-lit areas for relay stations.
content.assessment: Tally each greeting attempt (initiated or responded) across the 10 structured opportunities. Record: successful greeting, prompted greeting, or no response. Target: 8/10 successful greetings. Note which settings were easiest and most challenging for Maya.
